div.div:
Domain = Partition / VM
SWL = Software Level
ASIL = Automotive Safety
Integrity Level (SIL)
* Items in Yellow have additional DO-178C lifecycle activities
DO-178C (SWL)
- A = highest criticality
- E = lowest / lab-only (ASIL QM)
ASIL
- D = highest criticality (SWL-B)
- A = lowest
(SWL-D)
SIL
- 4 = highest criticality (SWL-A)
- 1 = lowest (SWL-D)
